case_title: PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC. VS. CHATEAUX CHEESE CORPORATION
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC. AS TO RESPONDENT CHATEAUX CHEESE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF KATHERINE G. HOOPES REGARDING PROOF OF SERVICE OF PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100039495) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.
NOTICE OF PACIFIC CHEESE CO. INC.S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 62062390) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100035927) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOLLOWING CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100068654) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOLLOWING CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100068654) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.
NOTICE OF NON-FILING OF OPPOSITION TO PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100041895) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CHATEAUX CHEESE CORPORATION $304,931.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $36,093.31 COSTS, $40,085.00 FOR THE ADMINISTRATIVE FEES AND COMPENSATION, TOTAL JUDGMENT $381,109.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 62062390) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

DECLARATION OF KATHRYN G. SPELMAN IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOLLOWING CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100068654) FILED BY PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Pacific Cheese Co. Inc.S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PACIFIC CHEESE CO., INC.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner Pacific Cheese Co., Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
